steps.title: Use the cube volume formula
steps.content: For a cube, the length, width, and height are all equal. If the edge length is $s$, the volume is the product of the three equal edge lengths.

steps.title: Substitute the edge length
steps.content:
With edge length $s=4$ inches, cube the edge length to find the volume in cubic inches.
$$V=4^3=4\cdot4\cdot4=64$$
The answer is 64.
